captures.success_response_wire_sample: POST https://api.zeta-ai.io/v1/rooms/f7e3683c-.../messages/stream -> 200, SSE token stream of the character reply. Companion: GET /v1/rooms/{roomId}/settings/cyoa (200). Raw SSE frames unavailable via Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard -> CDP/HAR for exact bytes. Sentry envelope (sentry.luda.ai) + pingpong.us POST also observed.
captures.frame_separator: SSE data: lines double-newline separated — inferred from text/event-stream + /messages/stream contract; not byte-confirmed
captures.dom_render_structure: Tailwind utility classes (no CSS-in-JS). User bubble div.flex.w-fit.flex-col.px-3.py-2.self-end.rounded; message text in div.chat.whitespace-pre-wrap.break-all (text-white / text-gray-200 / text-white-70 variants); narration in em.chat. 25 chat/message nodes (multi-character roleplay room).
captures.framework: Next.js (confirmed via Sentry client sentry.javascript.nextjs/10.51.0) + Tailwind CSS
captures.console_errors: not separately polled; no functional error, reply rendered. One FB privacy-sandbox pixel 503 (tracker, non-functional).

notes: etap-BYPASSED clean baseline. zeta is a character-roleplay AI (no single home chat box); opened an existing logged-in conversation room (/ko/rooms/{uuid}) to send the benign prompt. auth_state=logged-in (userId in GA payload). Chat endpoint cleanly captured = POST api.zeta-ai.io/v1/rooms/{roomId}/messages/stream (SSE). Benign prompt sent verbatim; user message + character reply rendered. API on separate host api.zeta-ai.io. Heavy 3rd-party trackers (FB, GA, MS Clarity). Raw SSE body not sampled (taint-guard) -> CDP/HAR for exact frames.
